excluded_categories.reason: No user input handling, authentication, permission, or data persistence beyond account creation is specified; security risks are noted but not explicitly required.
No permission or role-based access control is mentioned in the requirements.
No UI behavior, messages, loading state, or empty state is described in the requirements.
No dependencies are explicitly identified in the requirements.
No network-related requirements or dependencies are specified.
No localization or internationalization requirements are mentioned.

scenario_generation_rules: Generate positive test cases for successful account creation with valid email and password meeting minimum length.
Generate negative test cases for duplicate email (business rule BR001) and password shorter than 8 characters (business rule BR002).
Generate validation test cases for email uniqueness check (VAL001) and password length check (VAL002).
Generate boundary test cases for password length: exactly 8 characters, 7 characters, and 9 characters.

Do not include test cases for email format validation, password complexity, password confirmation, account verification, error handling, or session management as these are missing information and listed as clarification items.
Do not include test cases for UI behavior, security, permissions, integration, network, localization, or timezone as they are not explicitly required.
